prompt:
[Subject] Refer to Image 1 and Image 2

[Pose and Expression of the Subject]

The subject is sitting on a wooden seat inside a small and charming monorail capsule, looking straight ahead. Wearing black rectangular sunglasses, the subject has a cute pouting expression (as if kissing) and is lightly holding a small silver compact digital camera in the right hand at chest height.

[Outfit of the Subject]

The subject is wearing a bright pastel sky blue padded shirt jacket with brown button accents, paired with light blue denim pants. A cozy grey quilted drawstring pouch bag is resting on the knees.

[Hair Style and Makeup Details]

The subject has a long black wavy hairstyle with natural volume, with part of the side hair fixed with a small blue claw clip for a refreshing point. The makeup is based on a transparent and bright skin expression, with lively pink-coral lips applied moistly to the pouting mouth.

[Lighting and Light Direction]

Warm, yellow-tinted natural sunlight from late afternoon shines diagonally through the right window of the capsule. This light creates soft shadows on the left side of the person's face and the shirt's surface, filling the interior space with a warm and cozy atmosphere.

[Texture and Color Mood]

The various blue tones connecting the shirt, sea, and sky create a complementary color contrast with the vivid yellow of the external capsule. The fluffy texture of the padded shirt and the warm texture of the wooden interior harmonize, creating a bright mood filled with the excitement and relaxation of traveling.

[Film, Camera Lens Depth of Field, and Angle]

Shot using an aperture of f/2.8, shutter speed 1/320 sec, ISO 200, and a 35mm prime lens. It is a front eye-level angle that stably captures the person's upper body and the front table in the narrow capsule interior. A shallow depth of field was applied to depict the person very clearly, while the tracks and other capsules seen outside the window were softly out-focused.

[Background Elements (Optional)]

The interior of a coastal monorail (sky capsule) designed with white and wood tones. Above the head is an oval sign with the number '08', and a small monitor showing the tracks is installed at the top left. Outside the window, a yellow '78' capsule is passing on the aerial track, with the blue sea and green pine forest spreading out beyond it. A smartphone and a camera case are placed on the front wooden table.

[Signature] A small Meta-operated Threads logo is located at the bottom right, with "CHAse" written in small white cursive above it like a signature.
